summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security, the already-closed PR is kept closed, and the remaining open PRs are kept as independent backlog candidates because this job disables merge, fix PR, low-signal close, and instant close actions.
